parameters.subject: 🎉 Free Day Tomorrow!
parameters.message:
🎉 You have a free day tomorrow!

No meetings scheduled. Use the time for deep work, rest, or something you enjoy.

Generated by Meeting Prep Bot • Gemini AI

parameters.content:
# Meeting Prepration Bot 

###  This workflow automatically prepares and delivers a smart meeting briefing for your upcoming day. When triggered, it fetches all events scheduled for tomorrow from Google Calendar. It then checks whether any meetings exist. If meetings are found, the workflow processes each event individually and uses AI to generate a concise, professional meeting preparation summary including context, talking points, and expected outcomes. These summaries are then formatted into a clean, visually structured HTML email digest. Finally, the workflow sends this digest to your email. If no meetings are scheduled, it sends a “Free Day” notification instead. This ensures you are always prepared or informed ahead of time without manual effort.

# Setup Steps

## Prepare Google Calendar
Ensure your Google Calendar is connected and contains upcoming events with details like title, time, description, attendees, and location.

## Connect Accounts in n8n
Add credentials for:

Google Calendar (OAuth2)
Gmail (for sending emails)
Gemini / Google AI API (API key)

## Add Trigger
Start with a Manual Trigger (or Cron Trigger if you want automation daily).

## Fetch Calendar Events
Use Google Calendar node to get all events scheduled for tomorrow using time filters.

## Add Event Check Logic
Use a Set node to calculate whether events exist and count them, followed by an IF node to branch logic.

## Process Each Event
Use Split In Batches node to loop through each event individually.

## Generate AI Meeting Summary
Use HTTP Request node to call Gemini API and generate a professional meeting briefing.

## Parse AI Response
Use Code node to extract clean summary, event title, and time from AI response.

## Build Email Digest
Use Code node to format all summaries into a styled HTML email layout.

## Send Email Notification
If meetings exist → Send digest email via Gmail
If no meetings → Send “Free Day” email notification

##  Fetch Events & Prepare Check

Automatically retrieves all tomorrow’s calendar events and prepares basic checks like total events and whether any meetings exist. This step ensures the workflow knows if further processing is needed.

## Event Availability Decision

Evaluates whether meetings are scheduled or not. Based on this condition, the workflow either continues processing events or switches to sending a free-day notification.

##  Free Day Notification

Sends a simple email notification when no meetings are scheduled, allowing the user to plan their day for deep work or rest.

## Event Processing Loop

Iterates through each calendar event one by one to enable individual processing and personalized summary generation.

## AI Summary Generation & Parsing

Generates a professional meeting preparation summary using AI and then extracts structured data like event title, time, and summary for further use.

## AI Summary Generation & Parsing

Generates a professional meeting preparation summary using AI and then extracts structured data like event title, time, and summary for further use.
